evidence: "I am a huge fan of this series... Seasons 1 & 2 were flat-out brilliant."
"I watched this show when it was on the air, and, as a sci-fi fan, was completely taken by the concept..."
"...does not care about traditional or typical notions of cinematography, filmography, story arc, characterization."
"...the writing is, as mentioned, quite formulaic for post-apocalyptic..."

"...too much focus on film technique and less on the mystery, the deductions, the depth of character."

"...the production quality not as high as the final versions that made it to the air..."
"I am a particular fan of Benedict Cumberbath..."
"...I was turned around on him when I watched 'The Story of Us'..."

"...some of the most heartbreaking and powerful I've encountered."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of genres, particularly sci-fi and drama, and appreciates high production quality and strong performances. They have a keen eye for narrative complexity and emotional depth, often resonating with powerful storytelling and character development.
